commit.subject: LU-9692 kernel: kernel update [SLES12 SP2 4.4.59-92.20]
commit.message:
LU-9692 kernel: kernel update [SLES12 SP2 4.4.59-92.20]

Update target and kernel_config files for new version

Test-Parameters: clientdistro=sles12sp2 testgroup=review-ldiskfs \
  mdsdistro=sles12sp2 ossdistro=sles12sp2 \
  mdtfilesystemtype=ldiskfs ostfilesystemtype=ldiskfs

Signed-off-by: Bob Glossman <bob.glossman@intel.com>
